content:
**V2.3.3.0 二星幻衣「环行·拉蒙娜·幻梦假日」，可在限时纪行获取！
**

⏰️**活动时间： **
10月6日 9:00 - 10月20日 9:00（UTC+8）期间，特别纪行「假日纪行」活动限时开放。

📌**活动内容：**
✦ 完成所有纪行任务累计可免费获得：无垢之芯×10，银芯×800；
✦ 购买纪行需要「源液」×788。完成所有纪行任务累计可额外获得：环行·拉蒙娜全新幻衣「幻梦假日」×1，流明之芯×30，灵核碎片×25；
✦ 穿着「幻梦假日」幻衣后，环行·拉蒙娜的战斗内模组将会随之改变。「假日纪行」活动结束后该幻衣将在「幻衣订购」中上架，售价「源液」×980。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

**V2.3.3.0 Ramona: Timeworn's Two-Star Skin "Dreamy Vacation" Available in Limited-Time Archives!**

⏰️**Event Time:**
"Vacation Archives" will be available from <t:1759712400:F> to <t:1760922000:F>
*October 6, 9:00 to October 20, 9:00 (UTC+8)

📌**Event Details:**
✦ Complete Archive tasks to obtain: Pure Core×10, Silver×800;
✦ Purchase Premium Archives with Silver Prime×788 and complete all tasks to claim: Ramona: Timeworn's Skin "Dreamy Vacation" ×1, Luminous Core ×30, Gnosis Fragment ×25;
✦ "Dreamy Vacation" comes with a brand new combat sprite for Ramona: Timeworn. After the "Vacation Archives" event ends, this Skin will be available in "Garment Ordering" for a price of "Silver Prime" ×980.
thread_title: V2.3.3.0 二星幻衣「环行·拉蒙娜·幻梦假日」预告！Ramona: Timeworn's Two-Star Skin "Dreamy Vacation" Preview！
